name: Fruit Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fruits by peeling and slicing them. They can include papayas, peaches, or pineapples.
2. Alternatively, you can chop up apricots, nectarines, or plums, or halve and pit dark sweet cherries.
3. In a saucepan, combine 2/3 cup of apricot nectar with 1 tablespoon of cornstarch.
4. Add 1 teaspoon of brandy and 1 tablespoon of honey to the mixture.
5. Stir in 1/8 teaspoon of ground allspice until well combined.
6. Gradually add the prepared fruits to the saucepan, stirring gently.
7. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the soup reaches your desired consistency.
8. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
